title: Create: Pretty Structures
description: Structures for vanilla create mod (possible to be used server side only)
body: Create Pretty Structures is a work-in-progress Minecraft mod focused on adding immersive and detailed world-generated buildings. In this beta version, the mod introduces a handcrafted windmill structure that naturally generates in taiga and related biomes. It is still in early development, meaning only spruce-themed variants are currently included while support for all wood types is planned for future updates. More structures, variations, and biome integrations will be added over time as the mod expands. This is an early beta release, so feedback is welcome and features may change.![Spruce Windmill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23db816589d8fe78d1b1df7610510940dcf935a8_0.webp)
